data.content: Pushed registry-consistency sync hardening to origin/main. Added failure-path coverage for missing repo entries, added direct tests for updateRegisteredRepoMemoryManagerType including chmod behavior, and kept doctor fix messaging aligned with the new failure mode. Validation: bun run lint (existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and remote CI run 22823610834 passed.
